name: @ai-knowledge/mcp-server
description: MCP server for AI Knowledge Base — integrates with Claude Code and GitHub Copilot

scripts.build:deps: pnpm --filter @ai-knowledge/shared build && pnpm --filter @ai-knowledge/core build && pnpm --filter @ai-knowledge/embeddings build && pnpm --filter @ai-knowledge/sdk build
scripts.test: if find . -name '*.test.ts' -o -name '*.spec.ts' | grep -q .; then npx playwright test; else echo 'No tests found, skipping'; fi
